# ALS Model

This directory stores the trained ALS (Alternating Least Squares) collaborative filtering model.

## Generated by
`code/train_als.py` — Phase 2

## Contents (after training)
- `metadata/` — Model metadata and parameters
- `itemFactors/` — Item latent factor vectors (Parquet)
- `userFactors/` — User latent factor vectors (Parquet)

## How to regenerate
```bash
python code/train_als.py
```
